# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Let project owners pick the primary language for their hosted page.

## Success Criteria

- New projects can start with a non-English default language.
- Existing projects can update the default language from the editor.
- The public page keeps using the saved default language.

## UX Notes

- Show the default language as an explicit project setting.
- Keep the control simple and consistent with the rest of the editor.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- Changing the default language must keep existing assets aligned with that primary section.
